title: Raccoon Removal in Woodbury, Long Island | $900 – $4,000 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Woodbury, Long Island. Licensed experts handle raccoon infestations safely and humanely. Call Best Pest Control NYC today for a free quote!
intro: Raccoons are increasingly common in Woodbury's residential neighborhoods, attracted by the area's wooded settings and proximity to both commercial areas and natural habitats. These intelligent animals can cause significant damage to attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces while posing health risks to your family and pets. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive raccoon removal services throughout Woodbury, ensuring safe, humane, and effective solutions for homeowners.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of experience serving Long Island communities like Woodbury with licensed, insured technicians who understand local wildlife patterns. We offer complete raccoon removal services including inspection, humane trapping, damage repair, and exclusion work to prevent future intrusions, all backed by our satisfaction guarantee.
localContext: Woodbury's mix of established single-family homes, estates near the Woodbury Country Club, and properties backing onto wooded areas create ideal conditions for raccoon activity. The proximity to Syosset-Woodbury Community Park and the mature trees throughout neighborhoods provide perfect shelter for these nocturnal visitors seeking attic spaces and chimneys in local homes.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Woodbury?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Woodbury typically costs between $900 and $4,000, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, location of the nest, and extent of damage repairs needed. Our technicians provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in Woodbury neighborhoods?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are quite common in Woodbury due to the area's combination of wooded properties, mature landscaping, and residential structures that provide shelter. They're especially prevalent in neighborhoods with older homes that have accessible attics, chimneys, or crawl spaces.

faqs.question: Is raccoon removal humane and legal in Long Island?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Best Pest Control NYC follows all New York State wildlife regulations and uses only humane trapping and removal methods. We safely relocate raccoons according to local ordinances and ensure all exclusion work prevents future animals from entering your home.

faqs.question: What damage can raccoons cause to Woodbury homes?
faqs.answer: Raccoons can cause extensive damage including torn insulation, chewed wiring, destroyed ductwork, contaminated areas with feces and urine, and structural damage to soffits, vents, and roofing materials. They can also create health hazards through parasites and diseases like rabies and raccoon roundworm.
